question: Does the fixed BTCUSDT 20/30/60/90-day long-only Donchian ensemble retain sufficiently stable realistic-cost profitability on Binance Spot after removing perpetual funding?
intended_claim: product consideration for a Binance Spot extension only after all sequential gates
known_exposure: BTC market history through 2026H1 and the same Donchian family on perpetuals have been viewed. Exact Spot Donchian outcomes have not been run. The transferred candidate was selected from six prior Donchian candidates, so related-trial DSR uses ten total columns including later carry attempts.

data_quality_before_outcomes.timestamp_normalization: official millisecond values retained; official 2025+ microsecond values divided by 1000

fixed_candidate.exit: component midpoint trailing exit that never moves against the position

selection_bias.columns: six prior daily Donchian candidates, three prior carry-conditioned candidates, and this Spot candidate

development_gate: base and stress total returns positive
at least two of 2021/2022/2023 positive and worst year at least -5%
base Calmar exceeds continuous volatility-target long benchmark
base drawdown at least 25% shallower than 0.5x buy-and-hold
evaluation_gate: base and stress total returns positive
base Calmar exceeds continuous volatility-target long benchmark
confirmation_gate: base and stress total returns non-negative
evaluation plus confirmation compound base and stress CAGR above 4%
allowed_fixes_after_checkpoint: Only code, serialization, timestamp, integrity or documentation fixes that do not change candidate, costs, periods, metrics, gates or trial accounting. Record each fix and refresh the code hash before opening a new phase.
opening_rule: Run development only; evaluation requires evaluation_authorized=true; confirmation requires confirmation_authorized=true.
